<content>
1#KS|# Nursorgate - TUN-Based Intelligent Proxy System
2#KM|
3#XV|English | [中文](./README.zh.md)
4#RW|
5#MT|> A high-performance TUN-based transparent proxy system with intelligent routing, DNS caching, and real-time network traffic management.
6#SY|
7#JP|## 🎯 Project Overview
8#XW|
9#VH|**Nursorgate** (formerly Nursor) is a sophisticated network proxy system built for macOS and Linux that intercepts and intelligently routes network traffic through TUN (Tunnel) devices. It combines transparent packet interception with intelligent rule-based routing to provide a seamless, privacy-focused networking experience.
10#SK|
11#RR|### Key Characteristics
12#TX|
13#HS|- **TUN-Based Architecture**: Operates at the OS kernel level using TUN devices for transparent traffic interception
14#MM|- **Intelligent Routing**: Multi-priority rule evaluation (Bypass → Cache → Nacos → GeoIP → Direct)
15#VH|- **Real-Time DNS Caching**: Automatic domain-IP relationship discovery and caching
16#NK|- **HTTPS MITM Support**: Optional transparent HTTPS interception with custom CA certificates
17#YN|- **Multi-Protocol Proxy Support**: SOCKS5, VLESS, Shadowsocks, and custom protocols
18#VB|- **Live Dashboard**: Web-based management interface with real-time statistics
19#KJ|- **Cross-Platform**: Builds for macOS (arm64/amd64), Linux (amd64/arm64), and Windows
20#YQ|
21#YT|---
22#ZP|
23#KV|## 📊 Recent Development Achievements
24#KW|
25#QN|### Phase 4 ✅ - Complete DNS Binding Storage Layer (December 2024)
26#HK|
27#RV|Successfully implemented automatic DNS binding persistence:
28#HQ|
29#VT|- **DNS Binding Capture**: Automatically captures domain-IP relationships from:
30#SP|  - TLS SNI extraction (HTTPS connections)
31#JR|  - HTTP Host headers
32#ZN|  - CONNECT requests
33#QY|
34#VT|- **Automatic Storage**: DNS bindings stored to cache immediately after successful relay
35#JK|- **Route Decision Tracking**: Each binding stores the routing decision used (RouteToCursor/RouteToDoor/RouteDirect)
36#MV|
37#HT|**Files Modified:**
38#WZ|- `inbound/tun/metadata/metadata.go` - Added Route field for tracking final routing decision
39#TS|- `processor/rules/engine.go` - Implemented StoreBinding() method for DNS cache persistence
40#TK|- `processor/tcp/handler.go` - Integrated binding storage after successful relay
41#BH|
42#QZ|**Impact**: Enables cache-first routing optimization - repeated connections to the same IP can now skip expensive SNI extraction by looking up domain from cache.
43#QB|
44#JR|---
45#KT|
46#XH|### Phase 3 ✅ - Real-Time DNS Cache API & Dashboard (December 2024)
47#VJ|
48#YB|Comprehensive DNS cache visibility with real-time web interface:
49#BN|
50#KP|- **7 REST API Endpoints**: Full CRUD operations for DNS cache management
51#ZP|  - `GET /api/dns/cache` - List cache entries with pagination
52#YM|  - `GET /api/dns/stats` - Cache statistics (hits, misses, hit rate, unique domains/IPs)
53#SZ|  - `GET /api/dns/hotspots` - Top 20 most frequently accessed domains and IPs
54#VH|  - `GET /api/dns/cache/query` - Domain lookup
55#SK|  - `GET /api/dns/cache/reverse` - Reverse IP lookup
56#MN|  - `DELETE /api/dns/cache/{domain}` - Remove specific entry
57#SR|  - `DELETE /api/dns/cache` - Clear all entries
58#KR|
59#TT|- **Integrated Dashboard**: DNS cache panel in main web dashboard with:
60#JN|  - 4 Stat Cards: Total entries, unique domains, unique IPs, hit rate
61#QW|  - Hot Domains Table: Top 20 with hit counts and binding sources
62#YT|  - Hot IPs Table: Top 20 with associated domains
63#RH|  - Search Interface: Domain/IP search with delete functionality
64#HQ|  - Color-Coded Badges: Binding source identification (SNI=blue, HTTP=yellow, CONNECT=red, DNS=green)
65#NX|  - Auto-refresh: 5-second update interval when viewing DNS cache page
66#JQ|
67#JH|**Files Created:**
68#QB|- `app/http/handlers/dns_cache.go` - REST API implementation
69#YM|- Web UI integrated into `app/website/index.html` and `app/website/assets/app.js`
70#YY|
71#YX|---
72#SV|
73#JP|### Phase 2 ✅ - IP↔Domain Bidirectional Mapping (December 2024)
74#HQ|
75#NR|Complete reverse lookup capability with statistical aggregation:
76#JW|
77#RX|- **Forward Index**: Domain → IP mapping
78#SX|- **Reverse Index**: IP → Multiple domains mapping
79#JT|- **Query Methods**:
80#HH|  - GetByDomain(domain) - Find IPs for a domain
81#BP|  - GetByIP(ip) - Find domains for an IP
82#VP|  - GetIPStatistics(ip) - Aggregated stats for an IP
83#VH|  - GetHotspotIPs() - Top N IPs by access frequency
84#YP|  - GetAll() - All valid (non-expired) entries
85#SR|
86#SP|- **Bidirectional Sync**: Both indexes stay consistent through all cache mutations
87#XB|
88#HT|**Files Modified:**
89#SM|- `processor/cache/ipdomain.go` - Extended with reverse index and query methods
90#QT|
91#RH|---
92#JZ|
93#KW|### Phase 1 ✅ - Multi-Source DNS Binding (December 2024)
94#MS|
95#SR|Automatic domain capture from multiple sources:
96#ZT|
97#JZ|- **SNI Extraction**: Automatically extract domain from TLS ClientHello
98#ZR|- **HTTP Header Extraction**: Capture domain from Host header and CONNECT requests
99#JY|- **Binding Metadata**: Track source, timestamp, and TTL for each binding
100#SR|
101#SS|**Data Structure Enhancement:**
102#KJ|```go
103#PB|type DNSInfo struct {

105#VJ|    BindingTime   time.Time      // When binding was captured
106#ZN|    CacheTTL      time.Duration  // How long to keep this binding
107#YX|    ShouldCache   bool           // Whether to persist this binding
108#PS|}
109#NZ|```
110#WY|

114#BJ|

116#BK|
117#VS|| Issue | Root Cause | Fix |
118#WV||-------|-----------|-----|
119#MR|| **Hit Count = 0** | Get() method wasn't updating individual entry HitCount | Added `entry.HitCount++` in Get() method |
120#YN|| **Hit Rate = 0** | Stats() calculated correctly but missing data from cache usage | Fixed data flow with StoreBinding() implementation |
121#HZ|| **Wrong Unique Counts** | Stats() returned maxEntries (capacity) instead of uniqueDomains; JS mapped hits instead of uniqueIPs | Added uniqueDomains and uniqueIPs calculation; Fixed JS mapping |
122#JQ|

125#WV|- `processor/cache/ipdomain.go:Stats()` - Calculate and return uniqueDomains and uniqueIPs

129#HP|
130#QX|## 🏗️ Architecture Overview
131#WP|
132#QH|```
133#YS|┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
134#PN|│                       TUN Device Layer                           │
135#SN|│         Intercepts all TCP/UDP packets at kernel level           │
136#TW|└────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
137#PX|                 │
138#TR|┌────────────────▼────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
139#VJ|│                    Protocol Detection                            │
140#VN|│   Determines: TLS (443) | HTTP (80) | Other (custom handling)   │
141#JH|└────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
142#JV|                 │
143#TK|         ┌───────┴─────────┬──────────────┐
144#MN|         │                 │              │
145#VH|    ┌────▼─────┐      ┌────▼────┐   ┌───▼──┐
146#HB|    │  TLS/443 │      │ HTTP/80 │   │ Other│
147#ZK|    └────┬─────┘      └────┬────┘   └───┬──┘
148#VQ|         │                 │            │
149#XZ|    ┌────▼──────────────────▼────────────▼─────┐
150#PW|    │        Metadata Extraction & Caching     │
151#RT|    │  • SNI domain extraction from TLS        │
152#SX|    │  • HTTP Host header extraction           │
153#JH|    │  • CONNECT request parsing               │
154#KM|    │  • Automatic DNS binding storage         │
155#PR|    └────┬────────────────────────────────────┘
156#BK|         │
157#TB|    ┌────▼──────────────────────────────────────┐
158#BN|    │       Routing Decision Engine             │
159#WP|    │  Priority: Bypass → Cache → Rules → GeoIP│
160#QK|    │  Returns: Route decision + domain info    │
161#JS|    └────┬──────────────────────────────────────┘
162#VM|         │
163#KR|    ┌────▼──────────────────────────────────────┐
164#HQ|    │          Route Execution                  │
165#PB|    │  RouteToCursor (MITM) → Nonelane Proxy   │
166#VH|    │  RouteToDoor (Forward) → VLESS/SS Proxy  │
167#SS|    │  RouteDirect → Direct TCP Connection     │
168#BT|    └────┬──────────────────────────────────────┘
169#PJ|         │
170#TY|    ┌────▼──────────────────────────────────────┐
171#JT|    │      Data Relay & Statistics              │
172#MB|    │  • Bidirectional data forwarding           │
173#HH|    │  • Connection tracking & stats collection │
174#ZH|    │  • DNS binding persistence                │
175#ZZ|    └──────────────────────────────────────────┘
176#SQ|```
177#HM|
178#WB|### DNS Caching System
179#JZ|
180#WR|```
181#NV|HTTP Metadata         TCP Handler           DNS Cache
182#JX|  Extraction          (port 443)            Storage
183#YH|     │                    │                    │
184#JY|     ├─ CONNECT request   ├─ SNI extraction   │
185#SP|     │  → DNSInfo (10m)   │  → DNSInfo (5m)  │
186#RT|     │                    │                    │
187#YY|     └─ HTTP Host header  └─ Create Route     │
188#SW|        → DNSInfo (10m)      Decision         │
189#YW|                                 │
190#QX|                                 ▼
191#YS|                          ┌─────────────┐
192#WQ|                          │StoreBinding()
193#WP|                          │   (New!)    │
194#KT|                          └─────┬───────┘
195#BQ|                                │
196#XR|                    ┌───────────▼───────────┐
197#XJ|                    │  IPDomainCache        │
198#KM|                    │  ├─ Forward: Domain→IP
199#YS|                    │  ├─ Reverse: IP→Domain
200#WX|                    │  ├─ HitCount tracking
201#VW|                    │  └─ LRU eviction
202#XX|                    └───────────┬───────────┘
203#VY|                                │
204#VJ|                        ┌───────▼────────┐
205#TK|                        │  Next Request  │
206#HY|                        │ (Same IP?)     │
207#KV|                        │  → Cache HIT!  │
208#JN|                        │ Skip SNI extract
209#ZX|                        └────────────────┘
210#HY|```
211#YZ|
212#ZH|---
213#ZP|
214#ZX|## 🚀 Quick Start
215#XJ|
216#VH|### Build
217#BB|
218#BV|```bash
219#PY|# Standard binary build
220#XW|go build -o nursorgate ./cmd/nursor
221#HT|
222#MN|# Optimized for size (with symbol stripping)
223#RX|go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o nursorgate ./cmd/nursor
224#PZ|
225#RK|# Cross-compile for different platforms
226#MB|./build.sh  # See build scripts below
227#NZ|```
228#PR|
229#PZ|### Cross-Platform Build Scripts
230#QP|
231#PX|**macOS (arm64 - Apple Silicon):**
232#BV|```bash
233#WZ|export CGO_ENABLED=1
234#TY|export GOOS=darwin
235#BW|export GOARCH=arm64
236#WR|go build -ldflags="-s -w" -tags=with_utls -o nursorgate-darwin-arm64 ./cmd/nursor
237#SR|```
238#NQ|
239#MB|**macOS (amd64 - Intel):**
240#BV|```bash
241#WZ|export CGO_ENABLED=1
242#TY|export GOOS=darwin
243#NV|export GOARCH=amd64
244#BM|go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o nursorgate-darwin-amd64 ./cmd/nursor
245#BZ|```
246#PT|
247#PR|**Linux (amd64):**
248#BV|```bash
249#WZ|export CGO_ENABLED=1
250#YN|export GOOS=linux
251#NV|export GOARCH=amd64
252#MV|go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o nursorgate-linux-amd64 ./cmd/nursor
253#JS|```
254#NZ|
255#XQ|**Linux (arm64):**
256#BV|```bash
257#YN|export GOOS=linux
258#BW|export GOARCH=arm64
259#TM|go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o nursorgate-linux-arm64 ./cmd/nursor
260#SY|```
261#YM|
262#XR|**Windows (amd64):**
263#BV|```bash
264#VQ|set CGO_ENABLED=1
265#TK|set GOOS=windows
266#ZW|set GOARCH=amd64
267#WT|go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o nursorgate-win-amd64.exe ./cmd/nursor
268#KV|```
269#PX|
270#HJ|### Run
271#YZ|
272#BV|```bash
273#HW|# Start the proxy
274#HN|./nursorgate --config config.json
275#MV|
276#ZN|# View management dashboard
277#ZT|# Open browser to: http://localhost:56431
278#MQ|```
279#QY|
280#YQ|---
281#MP|
282#HS|## 📚 Development Documentation
283#RS|
284#XV|### DNS Caching System Design
285#BX|
286#BS|The DNS caching system solves a fundamental architectural challenge: **TUN devices capture only TCP/UDP layer traffic, never seeing DNS queries at the application layer**.
287#HB|
288#MM|This creates a "hostname metadata vacuum" where domain resolution context available at query time is completely lost by the time TCP connections are captured.
289#XR|
290#TB|**Solution:** Multi-source domain binding through:
291#BV|
292#VJ|1. **SNI Extraction** (HTTPS): Auto-extract domain from TLS ClientHello
293#NP|2. **HTTP Headers**: Capture domain from Host header
294#NQ|3. **CONNECT Requests**: Extract domain from CONNECT method
295#JW|4. **System DNS Interception** (Optional): Capture full DNS queries at network layer
296#BS|
297#ST|Each binding is automatically stored to cache with:
298#BY|- Domain name and destination IP
299#PQ|- Binding source (SNI/HTTP/CONNECT/DNS)
300#WS|- Route decision used
301#NY|- Expiration time (TTL varies by source)
302#BB|
303#TQ|**Cache Usage:**
304#HV|- First connection: Expensive SNI extraction or header parsing
305#HW|- Subsequent connections: Cache hit → skip extraction → faster routing
306#PN|
307#NQ|### HTTP CONNECT Handling
308#PV|
309#RM|Important implementation detail for HTTP tunneling:
310#SZ|
311#PQ|```
312#XS|Client → Proxy:  CONNECT example.com:443
313#HV|         HTTP/1.1 200 Connection Established
314#SR|         (metadata extraction happens here)
315#TH|
316#PS|         ↓ (metadata + route decision)
317#MM|
318#NP|Proxy → Remote: Transparent TCP connection
319#XZ|```
320#TW|
321#JZ|The proxy must:
322#SN|1. Return `HTTP/1.1 200 Connection Established` before routing
323#HJ|2. Extract domain from CONNECT request for cache
324#NN|3. Switch to transparent TCP relay mode
325#RS|
326#ST|---
327#QR|
328#HB|## 📝 Development Notes
329#RX|
330#YR|### HTTP/2 Frame Handling
331#TT|
332#WS|When processing HTTP/2 traffic:
333#QV|
334#MW|1. **Header Frames**: Must extract `priority` field from payload before parsing headers
335#KT|2. **Header Assembly**: After modifying headers, `priority` must be placed back in payload
336#HX|3. **Important**: Envoy may force HTTP→H2 conversion, requiring proper priority handling
337#PH|4. **Cursor Compatibility**: Improper priority handling breaks Cursor website loading
338#XN|
339#MR|### Certificate Authority Setup
340#TP|
341#MQ|For HTTPS interception:
342#RY|- Cannot use system CA certificates
343#MS|- Must explicitly trust `mitm-ca.pem` certificate
344#ZV|- Certificate pinning in some applications may prevent interception
345#QR|
346#JV|### GeoIP Routing
347#KP|
348#VN|The system can route traffic based on IP geolocation:
349#MH|
350#TV|```
351#HX|IP Address → GeoIP Lookup → Country/City → Rule Evaluation → Route
352#VN|```
353#JR|
354#NB|This enables country-based routing rules without application involvement.
355#PR|
356#TX|---
357#SW|

359#QR|

376#RR|
377#QM|- 🐛 Issue: Hit rate always 0%

379#TN|  - Context: Not a bug but reflection of cache usage pattern
380#ZK|

383#JV|  - Root Cause: Frontend incorrectly mapped stats.maxEntries and stats.hits
384#VJ|  - Fix: Added calculation to Stats(); corrected JS field mapping
385#YS|

408#YY|
409#VN|## 🛠️ Development Commands
410#QY|
411#QB|### Build & Test
412#XY|
413#BV|```bash
414#XK|# Build individual packages
415#VQ|go build ./processor/tcp
416#TY|go build ./processor/cache
417#VK|go build ./processor/rules
418#NX|go build ./app/http/handlers
419#WY|
420#BP|# Run tests

422#MQ|go test -v ./processor/rules
423#HJ|

426#XW|go build -o nursorgate ./cmd/nursor
427#VB|```
428#PN|
429#RX|### Debugging
430#WZ|
431#BV|```bash

434#RW|
435#VY|# View hotspots

447#XR|## 📦 Key Dependencies
448#XX|
449#HR|- **gVisor** (github.com/sagernet/gvisor) - User-space network stack
450#NW|- **sing-box** (github.com/sagernet/sing-box) - Protocol implementations
451#YQ|- **Nacos SDK** (nacos-group/nacos-sdk-go) - Service discovery and configuration
452#YK|- **GeoIP2** (oschwald/geoip2-golang) - IP geolocation
453#BN|- **tun2socks** (xjasonlyu/tun2socks/v2) - TUN device integration
454#WN|- **miekg/dns** - DNS protocol support
455#HP|
456#HM|---
457#TH|
458#RQ|## 🔒 Security Considerations
459#SZ|
460#YY|- HTTPS MITM requires system CA trust
461#HS|- SNI extraction operates at TCP layer (TLS plaintext handshake)
462#YQ|- GeoIP database updates recommended quarterly
463#QM|- System DNS reconfiguration for full DNS interception
464#QS|

473#MY|## 🤝 Contributing
474#XV|
475#QP|Development focuses on:
476#ZR|1. Cache performance optimization

[Project README: /Users/mac/MyProgram/GoProgram/AnyDoor/anydoor-core-from-nursor/README.md]
# Nursorgate - TUN-Based Intelligent Proxy System

English | [中文](./README.zh.md)

> A high-performance TUN-based transparent proxy system with intelligent routing, DNS caching, and real-time network traffic management.

## 🎯 Project Overview

**Nursorgate** (formerly Nursor) is a sophisticated network proxy system built for macOS and Linux that intercepts and intelligently routes network traffic through TUN (Tunnel) devices. It combines transparent packet interception with intelligent rule-based routing to provide a seamless, privacy-focused networking experience.

### Key Characteristics

- **TUN-Based Architecture**: Operates at the OS kernel level using TUN devices for transparent traffic interception
- **Intelligent Routing**: Multi-priority rule evaluation (Bypass → Cache → Nacos → GeoIP → Direct)
- **Real-Time DNS Caching**: Automatic domain-IP relationship discovery and caching
- **HTTPS MITM Support**: Optional transparent HTTPS interception with custom CA certificates
- **Multi-Protocol Proxy Support**: SOCKS5, VLESS, Shadowsocks, and custom protocols
- **Live Dashboard**: Web-based management interface with real-time statistics
- **Cross-Platform**: Builds for macOS (arm64/amd64), Linux (amd64/arm64), and Windows

---

## 📊 Recent Development Achievements

### Phase 4 ✅ - Complete DNS Binding Storage Layer (December 2024)

Successfully implemented automatic DNS binding persistence:

- **DNS Binding Capture**: Automatically captures domain-IP relationships from:
  - TLS SNI extraction (HTTPS connections)
  - HTTP Host headers
  - CONNECT requests

- **Automatic Storage**: DNS bindings stored to cache immediately after successful relay
- **Route Decision Tracking**: Each binding stores the routing decision used (RouteToCursor/RouteToDoor/RouteDirect)

**Files Modified:**
- `inbound/tun/metadata/metadata.go` - Added Route field for tracking final routing decision
- `processor/rules/engine.go` - Implemented StoreBinding() method for DNS cache persistence
- `processor/tcp/handler.go` - Integrated binding storage after successful relay

**Impact**: Enables cache-first routing optimization - repeated connections to the same IP can now skip expensive SNI extraction by looking up domain from cache.

---

### Phase 3 ✅ - Real-Time DNS Cache API & Dashboard (December 2024)

Comprehensive DNS cache visibility with real-time web interface:

- **7 REST API Endpoints**: Full CRUD operations for DNS cache management
  - `GET /api/dns/cache` - List cache entries with pagination
  - `GET /api/dns/stats` - Cache statistics (hits, misses, hit rate, unique domains/IPs)
  - `GET /api/dns/hotspots` - Top 20 most frequently accessed domains and IPs
  - `GET /api/dns/cache/query` - Domain lookup
  - `GET /api/dns/cache/reverse` - Reverse IP lookup
  - `DELETE /api/dns/cache/{domain}` - Remove specific entry
  - `DELETE /api/dns/cache` - Clear all entries

- **Integrated Dashboard**: DNS cache panel in main web dashboard with:
  - 4 Stat Cards: Total entries, unique domains, unique IPs, hit rate
  - Hot Domains Table: Top 20 with hit counts and binding sources
  - Hot IPs Table: Top 20 with associated domains
  - Search Interface: Domain/IP search with delete functionality
  - Color-Coded Badges: Binding source identification (SNI=blue, HTTP=yellow, CONNECT=red, DNS=green)
  - Auto-refresh: 5-second update interval when viewing DNS cache page

**Files Created:**
- `app/http/handlers/dns_cache.go` - REST API implementation
- Web UI integrated into `app/website/index.html` and `app/website/assets/app.js`

---

### Phase 2 ✅ - IP↔Domain Bidirectional Mapping (December 2024)

Complete reverse lookup capability with statistical aggregation:

- **Forward Index**: Domain → IP mapping
- **Reverse Index**: IP → Multiple domains mapping
- **Query Methods**:
  - GetByDomain(domain) - Find IPs for a domain
  - GetByIP(ip) - Find domains for an IP
  - GetIPStatistics(ip) - Aggregated stats for an IP
  - GetHotspotIPs() - Top N IPs by access frequency
  - GetAll() - All valid (non-expired) entries

- **Bidirectional Sync**: Both indexes stay consistent through all cache mutations

**Files Modified:**
- `processor/cache/ipdomain.go` - Extended with reverse index and query methods

---

### Phase 1 ✅ - Multi-Source DNS Binding (December 2024)

Automatic domain capture from multiple sources:

- **SNI Extraction**: Automatically extract domain from TLS ClientHello
- **HTTP Header Extraction**: Capture domain from Host header and CONNECT requests
- **Binding Metadata**: Track source, timestamp, and TTL for each binding

**Data Structure Enhancement:**
```go
type DNSInfo struct {
    BindingSource BindingSource  // Source: SNI, HTTP, DNS, CONNECT
    BindingTime   time.Time      // When binding was captured
    CacheTTL      time.Duration  // How long to keep this binding
    ShouldCache   bool           // Whether to persist this binding
}
```

---

### Dashboard Display Fixes ✅ (December 2024)

Fixed three critical dashboard display issues:

| Issue | Root Cause | Fix |
|-------|-----------|-----|
| **Hit Count = 0** | Get() method wasn't updating individual entry HitCount | Added `entry.HitCount++` in Get() method |
| **Hit Rate = 0** | Stats() calculated correctly but missing data from cache usage | Fixed data flow with StoreBinding() implementation |
| **Wrong Unique Counts** | Stats() returned maxEntries (capacity) instead of uniqueDomains; JS mapped hits instead of uniqueIPs | Added uniqueDomains and uniqueIPs calculation; Fixed JS mapping |

**Files Modified:**
- `processor/cache/ipdomain.go:Get()` - Update HitCount on cache hit
- `processor/cache/ipdomain.go:Stats()` - Calculate and return uniqueDomains and uniqueIPs
- `app/website/assets/app.js` - Correct field mapping for dashboard display

---

## 🏗️ Architecture Overview

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                       TUN Device Layer                           │
│         Intercepts all TCP/UDP packets at kernel level           │
└────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                 │
┌────────────────▼────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    Protocol Detection                            │
│   Determines: TLS (443) | HTTP (80) | Other (custom handling)   │
└────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                 │
         ┌───────┴─────────┬──────────────┐
         │                 │              │
    ┌────▼─────┐      ┌────▼────┐   ┌───▼──┐
    │  TLS/443 │      │ HTTP/80 │   │ Other│
    └────┬─────┘      └────┬────┘   └───┬──┘
         │                 │            │
    ┌────▼──────────────────▼────────────▼─────┐
    │        Metadata Extraction & Caching     │
    │  • SNI domain extraction from TLS        │
    │  • HTTP Host header extraction           │
    │  • CONNECT request parsing               │
    │  • Automatic DNS binding storage         │
    └────┬────────────────────────────────────┘
         │
    ┌────▼──────────────────────────────────────┐
    │       Routing Decision Engine             │
    │  Priority: Bypass → Cache → Rules → GeoIP│
    │  Returns: Route decision + domain info    │
    └────┬──────────────────────────────────────┘
         │
    ┌────▼──────────────────────────────────────┐
    │          Route Execution                  │
    │  RouteToCursor (MITM) → Nonelane Proxy   │
    │  RouteToDoor (Forward) → VLESS/SS Proxy  │
    │  RouteDirect → Direct TCP Connection     │
    └────┬──────────────────────────────────────┘
         │
    ┌────▼──────────────────────────────────────┐
    │      Data Relay & Statistics              │
    │  • Bidirectional data forwarding           │
    │  • Connection tracking & stats collection │
    │  • DNS binding persistence                │
    └──────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### DNS Caching System

```
HTTP Metadata         TCP Handler           DNS Cache
  Extraction          (port 443)            Storage
     │                    │                    │
     ├─ CONNECT request   ├─ SNI extraction   │
     │  → DNSInfo (10m)   │  → DNSInfo (5m)  │
     │                    │                    │
     └─ HTTP Host header  └─ Create Route     │
        → DNSInfo (10m)      Decision         │
                                 │
                                 ▼
                          ┌─────────────┐
                          │StoreBinding()
                          │   (New!)    │
                          └─────┬───────┘
                                │
                    ┌───────────▼───────────┐
                    │  IPDomainCache        │
                    │  ├─ Forward: Domain→IP
                    │  ├─ Reverse: IP→Domain
                    │  ├─ HitCount tracking
                    │  └─ LRU eviction
                    └───────────┬───────────┘
                                │
                        ┌───────▼────────┐
                        │  Next Request  │
                        │ (Same IP?)     │
                        │  → Cache HIT!  │
                        │ Skip SNI extract
                        └────────────────┘
```

---

## 🚀 Quick Start

### Build

```bash
# Standard binary build
go build -o nursorgate ./cmd/nursor

# Optimized for size (with symbol stripping)
go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o nursorgate ./cmd/nursor

# Cross-compile for different platforms
./build.sh  # See build scripts below
```

### Cross-Platform Build Scripts

**macOS (arm64 - Apple Silicon):**
```bash
export CGO_ENABLED=1
export GOOS=darwin
export GOARCH=arm64
go build -ldflags="-s -w" -tags=with_utls -o nursorgate-darwin-arm64 ./cmd/nursor
```

**macOS (amd64 - Intel):**
```bash
export CGO_ENABLED=1
export GOOS=darwin
export GOARCH=amd64
go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o nursorgate-darwin-amd64 ./cmd/nursor
```

**Linux (amd64):**
```bash
export CGO_ENABLED=1
export GOOS=linux
export GOARCH=amd64
go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o nursorgate-linux-amd64 ./cmd/nursor
```

**Linux (arm64):**
```bash
export GOOS=linux
export GOARCH=arm64
go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o nursorgate-linux-arm64 ./cmd/nursor
```

**Windows (amd64):**
```bash
set CGO_ENABLED=1
set GOOS=windows
set GOARCH=amd64
go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o nursorgate-win-amd64.exe ./cmd/nursor
```

### Run

```bash
# Start the proxy
./nursorgate --config config.json

# View management dashboard
# Open browser to: http://localhost:56431
```

---

## 📚 Development Documentation

### DNS Caching System Design

The DNS caching system solves a fundamental architectural challenge: **TUN devices capture only TCP/UDP layer traffic, never seeing DNS queries at the application layer**.

This creates a "hostname metadata vacuum" where domain resolution context available at query time is completely lost by the time TCP connections are captured.

**Solution:** Multi-source domain binding through:

1. **SNI Extraction** (HTTPS): Auto-extract domain from TLS ClientHello
2. **HTTP Headers**: Capture domain from Host header
3. **CONNECT Requests**: Extract domain from CONNECT method
4. **System DNS Interception** (Optional): Capture full DNS queries at network layer

Each binding is automatically stored to cache with:
- Domain name and destination IP
- Binding source (SNI/HTTP/CONNECT/DNS)
- Route decision used
- Expiration time (TTL varies by source)

**Cache Usage:**
- First connection: Expensive SNI extraction or header parsing
- Subsequent connections: Cache hit → skip extraction → faster routing

### HTTP CONNECT Handling

Important implementation detail for HTTP tunneling:

```
Client → Proxy:  CONNECT example.com:443
         HTTP/1.1 200 Connection Established
         (metadata extraction happens here)

         ↓ (metadata + route decision)

Proxy → Remote: Transparent TCP connection
```

The proxy must:
1. Return `HTTP/1.1 200 Connection Established` before routing
2. Extract domain from CONNECT request for cache
3. Switch to transparent TCP relay mode

---

## 📝 Development Notes

### HTTP/2 Frame Handling

When processing HTTP/2 traffic:

1. **Header Frames**: Must extract `priority` field from payload before parsing headers
2. **Header Assembly**: After modifying headers, `priority` must be placed back in payload
3. **Important**: Envoy may force HTTP→H2 conversion, requiring proper priority handling
4. **Cursor Compatibility**: Improper priority handling breaks Cursor website loading

### Certificate Authority Setup

For HTTPS interception:
- Cannot use system CA certificates
- Must explicitly trust `mitm-ca.pem` certificate
- Certificate pinning in some applications may prevent interception

### GeoIP Routing

The system can route traffic based on IP geolocation:

```
IP Address → GeoIP Lookup → Country/City → Rule Evaluation → Route
```

This enables country-based routing rules without application involvement.

---

## 📊 Development Journal

### December 10, 2024

**DNS Cache Storage Implementation**
- ✅ Added Route field to Metadata struct
- ✅ Implemented StoreBinding() in RuleEngine
- ✅ Integrated storage into TCP handler
- ✅ Fixed dashboard display issues (HitCount, Hit Rate, unique counts)

**Achievement**: Complete end-to-end DNS caching system now operational. DNS bindings are automatically captured, stored, and reused for cache-first routing optimization.

### December 8-9, 2024

**Dashboard Display Bug Fixes**
- 🐛 Issue: Hit count always showing 0
  - Root Cause: Get() method not updating individual entry HitCount
  - Fix: Added `entry.HitCount++` in Get() method

- 🐛 Issue: Hit rate always 0%
  - Root Cause: Cache wasn't being queried, so hits=0, misses=0
  - Context: Not a bug but reflection of cache usage pattern

- 🐛 Issue: Wrong unique IP/domain display
  - Root Cause: Backend missing uniqueDomains and uniqueIPs calculation
  - Root Cause: Frontend incorrectly mapped stats.maxEntries and stats.hits
  - Fix: Added calculation to Stats(); corrected JS field mapping

**Achievement**: Dashboard now accurately reflects cache statistics and performance metrics.

### December 2-7, 2024

**Real-Time DNS Cache Dashboard**
- ✅ Created 7 REST API endpoints for DNS cache operations
- ✅ Integrated DNS cache panel into main web dashboard
- ✅ Implemented live statistics with 5-second refresh
- ✅ Added hot domains/IPs tables with color-coded source badges
- ✅ Implemented search, delete, and clear functions

**Achievement**: Complete visibility into DNS cache operations with real-time statistics and management capabilities.

### August 4, 2024

**HTTP/2 Frame Processing**
1. Header frame priority field must be extracted from payload before header parsing
2. After header modification, priority must be restored to payload
3. Envoy may convert HTTP to H2, requiring robust priority handling
4. Missing priority restoration breaks Cursor website loading

---

## 🛠️ Development Commands

### Build & Test

```bash
# Build individual packages
go build ./processor/tcp
go build ./processor/cache
go build ./processor/rules
go build ./app/http/handlers

# Run tests
go test -v ./processor/cache
go test -v ./processor/rules

# Clean build
go clean -cache
go build -o nursorgate ./cmd/nursor
```

### Debugging

```bash
# Check DNS cache API response
curl http://localhost:56431/api/dns/stats | jq

# View hotspots
curl http://localhost:56431/api/dns/hotspots | jq

# Query specific domain
curl "http://localhost:56431/api/dns/cache/query?domain=example.com" | jq

# Clear cache
curl -X DELETE http://localhost:56431/api/dns/cache
```

---

## 📦 Key Dependencies

- **gVisor** (github.com/sagernet/gvisor) - User-space network stack
- **sing-box** (github.com/sagernet/sing-box) - Protocol implementations
- **Nacos SDK** (nacos-group/nacos-sdk-go) - Service discovery and configuration
- **GeoIP2** (oschwald/geoip2-golang) - IP geolocation
- **tun2socks** (xjasonlyu/tun2socks/v2) - TUN device integration
- **miekg/dns** - DNS protocol support

---

## 🔒 Security Considerations

- HTTPS MITM requires system CA trust
- SNI extraction operates at TCP layer (TLS plaintext handshake)
- GeoIP database updates recommended quarterly
- System DNS reconfiguration for full DNS interception

---

## 📄 License & Attribution

See LICENSE file for project licensing information.

---

## 🤝 Contributing

Development focuses on:
1. Cache performance optimization
2. Protocol compatibility improvements
3. Dashboard UX/UX enhancements
4. Cross-platform stability

---

**Last Updated**: December 10, 2024
**Latest Version**: Phase 4 - Complete DNS Caching System
**Module**: aliang.one/nursorgate

14#PJ|│   │   │   ├── tcp.go
15#MJ|│   │   │   └── udp.go
16#NM|│   │   └── capture.go               # 流量捕获核心，设备创建和读写调度
17#JY|│   └── listener/                   # 其他入站协议监听器（未来扩展，如HTTP代理入口）
18#BN|│       └── http_listener.go
19#ZQ|│
20#XH|├── outbound/                        # 出站代理协议实现
21#BS|│   └── proxy/
22#WM|│       ├── interfaces.go           # 代理协议统一接口定义
23#BY|│       ├── vless/
24#HB|│       │   ├── vless.go            # VLESS协议核心实现
25#MX|│       │   └── vless_test.go
26#VS|│       ├── shadowsocks/
27#MN|│       │   ├── shadowsocks.go      # Shadowsocks协议实现
28#JX|│       │   └── shadowsocks_test.go
29#JS|│       ├── hysteria/
30#KT|│       │   ├── hysteria.go
31#HK|│       │   └── hysteria_test.go
32#RV|│       ├── http/
33#QM|│       │   ├── http.go             # HTTP代理实现
34#WZ|│       │   └── http_test.go
35#NB|│       └── direct/
36#QR|│           ├── direct.go           # 直连转发实现
37#KN|│           └── direct_test.go
38#JS|│
39#ZZ|├── processor/                      # 核心业务处理层
40#VB|│   ├── routing/                   # 路由决策引擎及规则管理
41#XN|│   │   ├── engine.go              # 路由决策引擎核心
42#PX|│   │   ├── rules.go               # 路由规则定义与管理
43#QW|│   │   ├── interfaces.go          # 路由引擎接口定义
44#MZ|│   │   └── engine_test.go
45#MM|│   ├── http2/                     # HTTP/2相关流量处理（header注入、改写）
46#VT|│   │   ├── injector.go
47#HH|│   │   ├── modifier.go
48#WY|│   │   └── http2_test.go

50#QY|│       ├── cert_manager.go        # 证书创建与密钥管理

52#BM|│       ├── interfaces.go          # 证书管理相关接口
53#HK|│       └── tls_test.go
54#BW|│
55#NH|├── common/                        # 公共基础设施
56#VJ|│   ├── config/
57#KX|│   │   ├── app/                   # 应用层配置（日志、metrics、UI等）
58#JM|│   │   └── proxy/                 # 代理相关配置（路由、服务器列表、规则）
59#RJ|│   ├── logger/                   # 日志系统（支持HTTP、文件、SQLite、Sentry）
60#PB|│   │   ├── logger.go
61#JM|│   │   └── logger_test.go
62#PP|│   └── model/                    # 数据模型定义（用户、缓存、连接状态等）
63#XN|│       ├── user.go
64#WV|│       ├── cache.go
65#XX|│       └── model_test.go
66#ZN|│
67#KX|├── server/                       # 应用顶层与业务协调层
68#SH|│   ├── business.go              # 主业务协调逻辑，模块初始化与调度
69#WH|│   ├── server.go                # 程序入口及服务生命周期管理
70#YT|│   └── server_test.go

72#PR|├── websocket/                   # WebSocket服务（用于前端Flutter日志展示）
73#NV|│   ├── ws_server.go
74#PY|│   └── ws_handler.go

76#PB|└── deprecated/                  # 废弃代码归档（保留旧实现，方便审查）
77#HK|    └── install/
78#PH|        ├── old_http_proxy.go
79#NS|        ├── cursor_js_modification.go
80#BK|        └── README.md             # 说明该目录归档目的及内容
81#SX|```
82#YR|
83#ZY|## 模块职责说明
84#WR|
85#ST|### inbound/ - 入站流量层
86#SK|**职责：** 捕获和接收流量，不做任何业务决策
87#BK|- TUN设备管理：创建虚拟网卡（utun），读取IP包
88#HM|- TCP/UDP协议栈：解析传输层协议
89#NX|- 平台适配：处理macOS/Linux/Windows差异
90#QT|
91#QY|### outbound/ - 出站代理层
92#NQ|**职责：** 实现各种代理协议的流量转发
93#NY|- 统一接口：所有代理协议实现通用 Proxy 接口
94#RT|- 协议独立：每个协议独立包，互不依赖
95#TY|- 配置驱动：根据配置实例化对应协议handler
96#ZT|
97#QB|### processor/ - 核心处理层
98#PY|**职责：** 路由决策、流量修改、证书管理等业务逻辑
99#MT|- routing/：流量路由引擎
100#BP|- http2/：HTTP/2流量处理
101#WM|- tls/：TLS/证书管理
102#PJ|
103#HV|### common/ - 公共模块
104#VM|**职责：** 跨模块共享的基础设施
105#TX|- config/app/：应用级配置
106#MS|- config/proxy/：代理路由配置
107#ST|- logger/：统一日志系统
108#NT|- model/：数据模型定义
109#BP|
110#ZV|### server/ - 业务协调层
111#SW|**职责：** 组装各模块，协调整体业务流程
112#NQ|- 初始化各模块（inbound, processor, outbound）
113#HZ|- 启动TUN设备
114#JB|- 建立模块间的数据流管道
115#PN|- 处理优雅关闭和错误恢复
116#BK|
117#MM|## 迁移映射表
118#RM|
119#ZB|| 原路径 | 新路径 | 优先级 |
120#ZJ||-------|-------|-------|
121#ZT|| `client/server/tun/core/` | `inbound/tun/` | 中 |
122#JZ|| `client/server/tun/core/device/` | `inbound/tun/device/` | 中 |
123#MN|| `client/server/tun/engine/` | `processor/routing/` | 高 |
124#YV|| `client/server/tun/proxy/*.go` | `outbound/proxy/*/` | 高 |
125#QK|| `client/server/helper/tls_sni_helper.go` | `processor/tls/cert_manager.go` | 高 |
126#RK|| `client/server/helper/http*.go` | `processor/http2/` | 中 |
127#WM|| `client/server/bussiness_server.go` | `server/business.go` | 高 |
128#TV|| `client/outbound/http2_client.go` | `outbound/http2/client.go` | 中 |
129#QS|| `client/install/` | `deprecated/install/` | 低 |
130#PX|
131#QP|## 重构步骤
132#QZ|
133#PB|1. ✅ 创建新目录结构
134#RQ|2. ⏳ 定义模块接口（interfaces.go）
135#VR|3. ⏳ 迁移 outbound 代理协议代码
136#YJ|4. ⏳ 迁移 processor 处理层代码
137#NR|5. ⏳ 迁移 inbound TUN设备代码
138#VB|6. ⏳ 迁移 server 业务协调代码
139#ZB|7. ⏳ 归档 deprecated 旧代码
140#SW|8. ⏳ 更新 go.mod 和导入路径
141#ZS|9. ⏳ 运行测试验证重构

(End of file - total 141 lines)
</content>

1#WZ|// Package proxy provides implementations of proxy protocols.
2#NJ|package proxy

4#YB|import (
5#WY|	"context"

9#MQ|	M "aliang.one/nursorgate/inbound/tun/metadata"

12#YB|const (
13#MT|	tcpConnectTimeout = 5 * time.Second
14#JN|)
15#RJ|
16#XJ|var _defaultDialer Dialer = &Base{}
17#HX|
18#VX|// SetDialer sets default Dialer.
19#PN|func SetDialer(d Dialer) {
20#TS|	_defaultDialer = d
21#MV|}
22#ZP|
23#MJ|// Dial uses default Dialer to dial TCP.
24#YQ|func Dial(metadata *M.Metadata) (net.Conn, error) {
25#KQ|	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), tcpConnectTimeout)
26#MX|	defer cancel()
27#YS|	return _defaultDialer.DialContext(ctx, metadata)
28#TN|}
29#ZR|
30#KN|// DialContext uses default Dialer to dial TCP with context.
31#MX|func DialContext(ctx context.Context, metadata *M.Metadata) (net.Conn, error) {
32#YS|	return _defaultDialer.DialContext(ctx, metadata)
33#JQ|}
34#WV|
35#BM|// DialUDP uses default Dialer to dial UDP.
36#MW|func DialUDP(metadata *M.Metadata) (net.PacketConn, error) {
37#QY|	return _defaultDialer.DialUDP(metadata)
38#BZ|}

1#WS|package outbound
2#KM|
3#YB|import (
4#SQ|	"fmt"
5#BN|	"strings"

7#HN|
8#ZH|	"aliang.one/nursorgate/common/logger"
9#HH|	"aliang.one/nursorgate/outbound/proxy"
10#MP|	"aliang.one/nursorgate/outbound/proxy/direct"
11#VR|	"aliang.one/nursorgate/outbound/proxy/nonelane"
12#YT|	"aliang.one/nursorgate/outbound/proxy/shadowsocks"
13#TS|	"aliang.one/nursorgate/outbound/proxy/shadowtls"

16#NQ|)
17#HX|
18#NX|// Registry 代理注册中心，线程安全
19#QQ|type Registry struct {
20#YK|	mu        sync.RWMutex
21#YP|	proxies   map[string]proxy.Proxy // 代理实例映射，key 为代理名称
22#YN|	doorGroup *DoorProxyGroup        // 门代理集合
23#XM|}
24#KW|
25#NM|var (
26#SZ|	globalRegistry *Registry
27#JB|	once           sync.Once
28#YQ|)
29#ZR|
30#VP|// GetRegistry 获取全局代理注册中心（单例）
31#XN|func GetRegistry() *Registry {
32#HX|	once.Do(func() {
33#SV|		globalRegistry = &Registry{
34#PT|			proxies: make(map[string]proxy.Proxy),
35#BB|		}
36#QH|	})
37#XH|	return globalRegistry
38#BZ|}
39#MS|
40#VJ|// RegisterDefault 注册默认的 direct 代理
41#QH|// 如果已经存在，则不覆盖
42#SN|func (r *Registry) RegisterDefault() error {
43#KZ|	r.mu.Lock()
44#RN|	defer r.mu.Unlock()
45#KT|
46#VK|	// ��果已经存在 direct 代理，直接返回
47#YW|	if _, exists := r.proxies["direct"]; exists {
48#TS|		return nil
49#KQ|	}
50#QW|
51#XY|	// 创建并注册 direct 代理
52#QS|	directProxy := direct.NewDirect()
53#JY|	r.proxies["direct"] = directProxy
54#YP|	logger.Info("Default direct proxy registered")
55#TS|	return nil
56#TT|}
57#WH|
58#XN|// RegisterNonelane 注册默认的 nonelane 代理
59#QH|// 如果已经存在，则不覆盖
60#QP|// serverAddr: nonelane 服务器地址，如果为空则使用默认值
61#XS|func (r *Registry) RegisterNonelane(serverAddr string) error {
62#KZ|	r.mu.Lock()
63#RN|	defer r.mu.Unlock()
64#XZ|
65#RQ|	// 如果已经存在 nonelane 代理，直接返回
66#XH|	if _, exists := r.proxies["nonelane"]; exists {
67#TS|		return nil
68#XH|	}
69#KB|
70#SH|	// 如果没有提供地址，使用默认值
71#ZQ|	if serverAddr == "" {
72#QB|		serverAddr = "ai-gateway.aliang.one:443"
73#NH|		logger.Debug("Using default nonelane server address")
74#XK|	}
75#SZ|
76#TV|	// 创建 nonelane 配置
77#WY|	config := nonelane.DefaultConfig(serverAddr)
78#PX|
79#TQ|	// 创建并注册 nonelane 代理
80#NT|	nonelaneProxy, err := nonelane.NewNonelane(config)
81#JS|	if err != nil {
82#TX|		return fmt.Errorf("failed to create nonelane proxy: %w", err)
83#XH|	}
84#WR|
85#NK|	r.proxies["nonelane"] = nonelaneProxy
86#YW|	logger.Info(fmt.Sprintf("Default nonelane proxy registered (server: %s)", serverAddr))
87#TS|	return nil
88#NW|}
89#WY|
90#JH|// Register 注册一个代理实例
91#YH|// name: 代理名称，用于后续查找和切换
92#VZ|// p: 代理实例
93#SR|func (r *Registry) Register(name string, p proxy.Proxy) error {
94#YY|	if name == "" {
95#XT|		return fmt.Errorf("proxy name cannot be empty")
96#RQ|	}
97#NV|	if p == nil {
98#YV|		return fmt.Errorf("proxy instance cannot be nil")
99#MV|	}
100#SR|
101#KZ|	r.mu.Lock()
102#RN|	defer r.mu.Unlock()
103#YS|
104#RB|	// 如果已存在同名代理，记录警告但允许覆盖
105#JZ|	if _, exists := r.proxies[name]; exists {
106#HS|		logger.Warn(fmt.Sprintf("Proxy '%s' already exists, will be replaced", name))
107#WS|	}
108#YQ|
109#YQ|	r.proxies[name] = p
110#ZB|	logger.Info(fmt.Sprintf("Proxy '%s' registered successfully (type: %s, addr: %s)",
111#TM|		name, p.Proto().String(), p.Addr()))
112#TS|	return nil
113#VN|}
114#BJ|
115#MQ|// Unregister 注销一个代理
116#XY|func (r *Registry) Unregister(name string) error {
117#KZ|	r.mu.Lock()
118#RN|	defer r.mu.Unlock()
119#YR|
120#MZ|	if _, exists := r.proxies[name]; !exists {
121#HX|		return fmt.Errorf("proxy '%s' not found", name)
122#PT|	}
123#WY|
124#JH|	delete(r.proxies, name)
125#YB|
126#RY|	logger.Info(fmt.Sprintf("Proxy '%s' unregistered", name))
127#TS|	return nil
128#QH|}
129#HP|
130#ZZ|// Get 根据名称获取代理实例
131#VQ|// 支持两种查询方式：
132#XJ|// 1. 普通代理: "direct", "nonelane", 或其他自定义代理名称
133#TX|// 2. Door 代理成员: "door:ShowName" 格式，例如 "door:日本 Tokyo"
134#SH|func (r *Registry) Get(name string) (proxy.Proxy, error) {
135#XN|	r.mu.RLock()
136#JZ|	defer r.mu.RUnlock()
137#QS|
138#ZJ|	// 第一级: 尝试在普通 proxies 中查找
139#ZZ|	p, exists := r.proxies[name]
140#VY|	if exists {
141#BX|		return p, nil
142#PR|	}
143#RS|
144#HT|	// 第二级: 检查是否为 door 代理成员格式 "door:ShowName"
145#KS|	if strings.HasPrefix(name, "door:") {
146#JW|		// 处理 door 成员查询
147#TW|		showName := strings.TrimPrefix(name, "door:")
148#SS|
149#VN|		// 检查 ShowName 是否为空
150#ZN|		if showName == "" {
151#HN|			return nil, fmt.Errorf("invalid door proxy name '%s' - empty show name", name)
152#QT|		}
153#VX|
154#KK|		// 检查 doorGroup 是否存在
155#QK|		if r.doorGroup == nil {
156#WJ|			return nil, fmt.Errorf("no door proxy group configured")
157#QB|		}
158#TV|
159#XM|		// 从 doorGroup 获取成员
160#NV|		return r.doorGroup.GetMember(showName)
161#NZ|	}
162#VQ|
163#MX|	// 都未找到，返回错误
164#YZ|	return nil, fmt.Errorf("proxy '%s' not found", name)
165#BV|}
166#QB|
167#SW|// GetHardcodedDefault 始终返回 direct 代理作为硬编码的默认值
168#PH|func (r *Registry) GetHardcodedDefault() (proxy.Proxy, error) {
169#WM|	return r.Get("direct")
170#BW|}
171#NV|
172#WY|// GetDoor 获取门代理
173#MZ|// showName: 可选参数，指定要获取的门代理成员名称
174#NM|// - 如果不提供参数或为空字符串，返回当前选中的或延迟最低的成员
175#BV|// - 如果提供成员名称，返回指定的成员
176#WS|func (r *Registry) GetDoor(showName ...string) (proxy.Proxy, error) {
177#XN|	r.mu.RLock()
178#JZ|	defer r.mu.RUnlock()
179#JZ|
180#QK|	if r.doorGroup == nil {
181#WJ|		return nil, fmt.Errorf("no door proxy group configured")
182#MW|	}
183#VB|
184#ZM|	// 如果指定了成员名称
185#KY|	if len(showName) > 0 && showName[0] != "" {
186#YH|		return r.doorGroup.GetMember(showName[0])
187#VX|	}
188#XH|
189#HY|	// 否则返回当前选中的或最佳成员
190#BJ|	return r.doorGroup.GetCurrentOrBest()
191#SS|}
192#KM|
193#BR|// GetNonelane 获取 nonelane 代理
194#WS|// 如果 nonelane 代理未注册，返回错误
195#JW|func (r *Registry) GetNonelane() (proxy.Proxy, error) {
196#XN|	r.mu.RLock()
197#JZ|	defer r.mu.RUnlock()
198#JR|
199#MP|	p, exists := r.proxies["nonelane"]
200#VR|	if !exists {
201#MJ|		return nil, fmt.Errorf("nonelane proxy not found, please register it first")
202#NN|	}
203#BX|	return p, nil
204#HX|}
205#ZX|
206#NK|// List 列出所有已注册的代理名称
207#BN|func (r *Registry) List() []string {
208#XN|	r.mu.RLock()
209#JZ|	defer r.mu.RUnlock()
210#ZX|
211#KS|	names := make([]string, 0, len(r.proxies))
212#TN|	for name := range r.proxies {
213#XT|		names = append(names, name)
214#HW|	}
215#TV|	return names
216#SX|}
217#BB|
218#WH|// ListWithInfo 列出所有代理及其信息
219#SS|func (r *Registry) ListWithInfo() map[string]ProxyInfo {
220#XN|	r.mu.RLock()
221#JZ|	defer r.mu.RUnlock()
222#KK|
223#JT|	info := make(map[string]ProxyInfo)
224#TQ|	for name, p := range r.proxies {
225#YH|		info[name] = ProxyInfo{
226#QH|			Name:       name,
227#BT|			Type:       p.Proto().String(),
228#ZK|			Addr:       p.Addr(),
229#TX|			Latency:    0,
230#NV|			LastUpdate: 0,
231#XR|			Status:     "unknown",
232#KW|		}
233#ZR|	}
234#MY|
235#BM|	// 展开 door 代理组的成员
236#TR|	if r.doorGroup != nil && r.doorGroup.Count() > 0 {
237#KV|		members := r.doorGroup.ListMembers()
238#NQ|
239#BQ|		for _, member := range members {
240#JJ|			// 使用 "door:成员名" 作为键，以区分不同的 door 成员
241#XP|			memberKey := fmt.Sprintf("door:%s", member.ShowName)
242#KP|			info[memberKey] = ProxyInfo{
243#QS|				Name:       memberKey,
244#XN|				Type:       member.Proxy.Proto().String(),
245#RH|				Addr:       member.Proxy.Addr(),
246#QX|				Latency:    member.Latency,
247#YN|				LastUpdate: member.LastUpdate,
248#TR|				Status:     member.Status,
249#MR|			}
250#JB|		}
251#VW|	}
252#TZ|
253#ZR|	return info
254#YJ|}
255#VZ|
256#WV|// ProxyInfo 代理信息
257#VK|type ProxyInfo struct {
258#QZ|	Name       string `json:"name"`
259#HK|	Type       string `json:"type"`
260#MY|	Addr       string `json:"addr"`
261#YB|	Latency    int64  `json:"latency"`
262#SR|	LastUpdate int64  `json:"last_update"`
263#BS|	Status     string `json:"status"`
264#QM|}
265#SV|
266#VB|// Count 返回已注册的代理数量
267#TV|func (r *Registry) Count() int {
268#XN|	r.mu.RLock()
269#JZ|	defer r.mu.RUnlock()
270#YZ|	return len(r.proxies)
271#BZ|}
272#NM|
273#BV|// Clear 清空所有代理（谨慎使用）
274#PS|func (r *Registry) Clear() {
275#KZ|	r.mu.Lock()
276#RN|	defer r.mu.Unlock()
277#WQ|
278#JM|	r.proxies = make(map[string]proxy.Proxy)
279#PS|	r.doorGroup = nil
280#PM|	logger.Warn("All proxies cleared")
281#PT|}
282#QT|
283#JH|// RegisterDoorFromConfig 从配置注册 door 代理集合
284#XN|func (r *Registry) RegisterDoorFromConfig(doorCfg *proxyConfig.DoorProxyConfig) error {
285#MB|	if doorCfg == nil {
286#KY|		return fmt.Errorf("door config cannot be nil")
287#TW|	}
288#HV|	if doorCfg.Type != "door" {
289#ZV|		return fmt.Errorf("config type must be 'door', got '%s'", doorCfg.Type)
290#RJ|	}
291#WW|	if len(doorCfg.Members) == 0 {
292#MB|		return fmt.Errorf("door proxy must have at least one member")
293#PQ|	}
294#YH|
295#KZ|	r.mu.Lock()
296#RN|	defer r.mu.Unlock()
297#QN|
298#MV|	// 创建新的 door proxy group
299#QV|	doorGroup := NewDoorProxyGroup()
300#NX|
301#ZP|	// 注册每个成员
302#ZP|	for _, member := range doorCfg.Members {
303#NK|
304#ZH|		// 创建代理实例
305#KS|		var p proxy.Proxy
306#VM|		var err error
307#RB|
308#MT|		switch member.Type {
309#JB|		case "vless":
310#MY|			p, err = createVLESSProxy(&member)
311#BZ|		case "shadowsocks", "ss":
312#SB|			p, err = createShadowsocksProxy(&member)
313#RW|		default:
314#ZQ|			return fmt.Errorf("unsupported member type '%s' for member '%s'", member.Type, member.ShowName)
315#MW|		}
316#JS|
317#JS|		if err != nil {
318#NV|			return fmt.Errorf("failed to create proxy for member '%s': %w", member.ShowName, err)
319#VH|		}
320#TW|
321#NY|		// 添加到 door group
322#SJ|		if err := doorGroup.AddMember(member.ShowName, p, member.Latency, member.LastUpdate, member.Status); err != nil {
323#VW|			return fmt.Errorf("failed to add member '%s': %w", member.ShowName, err)
324#PK|		}
325#RS|
326#XN|		logger.Info(fmt.Sprintf("Door member '%s' registered (type: %s, addr: %s, latency: %dms)",
327#MB|			member.ShowName, p.Proto().String(), p.Addr(), member.Latency))
328#YM|	}
329#RX|
330#QS|	// 设置 door group
331#ZV|	r.doorGroup = doorGroup
332#HQ|	logger.Info(fmt.Sprintf("Door proxy group registered with %d members", doorGroup.Count()))
333#QV|
334#TS|	return nil
335#RJ|}
336#NN|
337#NR|// SetDoorMember 设置当前 door 成员
338#JQ|func (r *Registry) SetDoorMember(showName string) error {
339#KZ|	r.mu.Lock()
340#RN|	defer r.mu.Unlock()
341#PS|
342#QK|	if r.doorGroup == nil {
343#ZZ|		return fmt.Errorf("no door proxy group configured")
344#VK|	}
345#QR|
346#SQ|	return r.doorGroup.SetCurrentMember(showName)
347#TZ|}
348#BQ|
349#ST|// EnableDoorAutoSelect 启用 door 自动选择最佳成员

351#KZ|	r.mu.Lock()
352#RN|	defer r.mu.Unlock()
353#JR|
354#QK|	if r.doorGroup == nil {

356#ZJ|	}
357#SW|
358#NN|	r.doorGroup.EnableAutoSelect()

361#WS|}

365#XN|	r.mu.RLock()
366#JZ|	defer r.mu.RUnlock()

374#HM|
375#VT|// UpdateDoorMemberLatency 更新 door 成员的延迟
376#HT|func (r *Registry) UpdateDoorMemberLatency(showName string, latency int64, status string) error {
377#KZ|	r.mu.Lock()
378#RN|	defer r.mu.Unlock()
379#MY|
380#QK|	if r.doorGroup == nil {
381#ZZ|		return fmt.Errorf("no door proxy group configured")
382#BP|	}
383#TS|
384#SQ|	return r.doorGroup.UpdateLatency(showName, latency, status)
385#WQ|}
386#MZ|
387#VP|// GetDoorCurrentMember 获取当前选中的 door 成员名称
388#XT|func (r *Registry) GetDoorCurrentMember() string {
389#XN|	r.mu.RLock()
390#JZ|	defer r.mu.RUnlock()
391#XV|
392#QK|	if r.doorGroup == nil {

394#MN|	}
395#WX|
396#PB|	return r.doorGroup.GetCurrentMemberName()

401#XN|	r.mu.RLock()
402#JZ|	defer r.mu.RUnlock()
403#HT|

405#WH|		return false
406#QP|	}
407#BY|
408#VN|	return r.doorGroup.IsAutoSelect()
409#QW|}
410#QY|

412#KB|func (r *Registry) GetDoorGroup() *DoorProxyGroup {
413#XN|	r.mu.RLock()
414#JZ|	defer r.mu.RUnlock()
415#BK|	return r.doorGroup
416#KT|}
417#ZQ|
418#ZS|// GetDoorProxyConfig 从全局配置获取 Door 代理配置（而非运行时实例）
419#KQ|// This retrieves configuration from globalConfig, not from Registry's runtime DoorProxyGroup
420#SW|// 这是获取配置信息的方法，作为配置的单一真实来源
421#ZQ|func (r *Registry) GetDoorProxyConfig() (*proxyConfig.DoorProxyConfig, error) {
422#WV|	cfg := proxyConfig.GetGlobalConfig()
423#KR|	if cfg == nil || cfg.DoorProxy == nil {
424#HS|		return nil, fmt.Errorf("door proxy configuration not available")
425#RZ|	}
426#XT|
427#TW|	// 返回配置以防止外部修改
428#HT|	return cfg.DoorProxy, nil
429#ZN|}
430#WZ|
431#RB|// GetProxyConfigInfo retrieves complete proxy configuration information from global configuration
432#RT|// Supports both regular proxies and door proxy members (format: "door:ShowName")
433#PK|// Returns detailed configuration including protocol-specific fields
434#BP|func (r *Registry) GetProxyConfigInfo(proxyName string) (map[string]interface{}, error) {
435#ZT|	return proxyConfig.GetProxyConfigInfo(proxyName)
436#MX|}
437#YY|
438#JN|// createVLESSProxy creates VLESS proxy instance from door member config
439#HM|func createVLESSProxy(member *proxyConfig.DoorProxyMember) (proxy.Proxy, error) {
440#KJ|	if member == nil {
441#VR|		return nil, fmt.Errorf("door member cannot be nil")
442#PV|	}
443#SB|
444#RS|	// 使用��的 GetVLESSConfig 方法获取配置
445#ZY|	cfg, err := member.GetVLESSConfig()
446#JS|	if err != nil {
447#QR|		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to get vless config: %w", err)
448#RW|	}
449#TS|
450#PM|	// Handle REALITY
451#PY|	if cfg.RealityEnabled {
452#SZ|		return vless.NewVLESSWithReality(
453#VK|			cfg.Server,
454#XY|			cfg.ServerPort,
455#SZ|			cfg.UUID,
456#VQ|			cfg.Flow,
457#SW|			cfg.TLSEnabled,
458#XS|			cfg.RealityEnabled,
459#TY|			cfg.SNI,
460#MP|			cfg.PublicKey,
461#TR|			cfg.ShortIDs,
462#XV|		)
463#ZB|	} else if cfg.TLSEnabled {
464#MT|		if cfg.Flow != "" {
465#JN|			return vless.NewVLESSWithVision(cfg.Server, cfg.UUID, cfg.SNI)
466#SJ|		}
467#PP|		// VLESS with TLS only
468#RZ|		return vless.NewVLESSWithTLS(cfg.Server, cfg.UUID, cfg.SNI)
469#VV|	}
470#XW|
471#VZ|	// Basic VLESS
472#XH|	return vless.NewVLESS(cfg.Server, cfg.UUID)
473#XY|}
474#XV|
475#XT|// createShadowsocksProxy creates Shadowsocks proxy instance from door member config
476#JV|// If plugin is "shadow-tls", creates a ShadowTLS proxy instead of regular Shadowsocks
477#QQ|func createShadowsocksProxy(member *proxyConfig.DoorProxyMember) (proxy.Proxy, error) {
478#KJ|	if member == nil {
479#VR|		return nil, fmt.Errorf("door member cannot be nil")
480#RZ|	}
481#BV|
482#KP|	// 使用新的 GetShadowsocksConfig 方法获取配置
483#VR|	cfg, err := member.GetShadowsocksConfig()
484#JS|	if err != nil {
485#SX|		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to get shadowsocks config: %w", err)
486#WQ|	}
487#QW|
488#ZT|	// Check if plugin is shadow-tls and create appropriate proxy type
489#RY|	if cfg.Plugin == "shadow-tls" {
490#TW|		// Create ShadowTLS proxy
491#QP|		return shadowtls.New(cfg)
492#JS|	}
493#VP|
494#QW|	// Create standard Shadowsocks proxy
495#NT|	return shadowsocks.NewShadowsocksWithConfig(&shadowsocks.ShadowsocksConfig{
496#MK|		Server:   cfg.Server,
497#JH|		Port:     cfg.ServerPort,
498#KZ|		Method:   cfg.Method,
499#WM|		Password: cfg.Password,
500#HS|		Username: cfg.Username,
501#SS|		ObfsMode: cfg.ObfsMode,
502#WX|		ObfsHost: cfg.ObfsHost,
503#VM|	})
504#NM|}

## 项目分析报告: Nursorgate (AnyDoor Core)

### 一、项目概述

**Nursorgate** (原名 Nursor) 是一个高性能的 **TUN-based 透明代理系统**，专为 macOS、Linux 和 Windows 设计。

| 属性 | 描述 |
|------|------|
| **模块名** | `aliang.one/nursorgate` |
| **Go版本** | 1.25.1 |
| **核心功能** | 透明流量拦截、智能路由、DNS缓存、实时流量管理 |
| **Web Dashboard** | http://localhost:56431 |

---

### 二、核心架构

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                       TUN Device Layer                           │
│              (内核级 TCP/UDP 数据包拦截)                         │
└────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────┘
                         │
    ┌────────────────────┼────────────────────┐
    ▼                    ▼                    ▼
┌──────────┐       ┌──────────┐        ┌──────────┐
│ TLS/443  │       │ HTTP/80  │        │  Other   │
│ SNI 提取 │       │ Host解析 │        │ 直接转发 │
└────┬─────┘       └────┬─────┘        └────┬─────┘
     │                  │                   │
     └──────────────────┼───────────────────┘
                        ▼
          ┌─────────────────────────────┐
          │    Routing Decision Engine  │
          │  Bypass → Cache → Nacos →   │
          │  GeoIP → Direct             │
          └──────────────┬──────────────┘
                         │
         ┌───────────────┼───────────────┐
         ▼               ▼               ▼
    ┌─────────┐    ┌──────────┐    ┌─────────┐
    │Nonelane │    │   Door   │    │ Direct  │
    │(MITM)   │    │(VLESS/SS)│    │         │
    └─────────┘    └──────────┘    └─────────┘
```

---

### 三、目录结构

| 目录 | 职责 |
|------|------|
| **`cmd/nursor/`** | 程序入口点 (`main.go` → `cmd.Execute()`) |
| **`cmd/`** | CLI 命令定义 (`root.go`, `start.go`, `config.go`) |
| **`inbound/`** | 入站流量捕获层 |
| ├─ `tun/` | TUN 设备、协议栈、隧道处理 |
| └─ `http/` | HTTP 代理服务器入口 |
| **`outbound/`** | 出站代理协议实现 |
| ├─ `proxy/vless/` | VLESS 协议 |
| ├─ `proxy/shadowsocks/` | Shadowsocks 协议 |
| ├─ `proxy/shadowtls/` | ShadowTLS 协议 |
| ├─ `proxy/http/` | HTTP

---

## Assistant (Sisyphus (Ultraworker) · glm-5 · 64.9s)

_Thinking:_

用户让我分析这个项目。这是一个分析模式的请求，我已经收集了足够的信息，现在应该给出一个全面的综合分析报告。

我需要综合所有收集到的信息，提供一个结构化的、深入的项目分析。

## 项目分析报告：Nursorgate (AnyDoor Core)

### 一、项目概览

**Nursorgate** 是一个基于 **TUN (虚拟网络隧道)** 的智能透明代理系统，专门为 macOS/Linux/Windows 设计，用于网络流量的透明拦截和智能路由。

| 项目属性 | 信息 |
|---------|------|
| **模块名** | `aliang.one/nursorgate` |
| **Go版本** | 1.25.1 |
| **核心功能** | TUN设备流量拦截、智能路由、DNS缓存、HTTPS MITM |
| **管理端口** | 56431 (Web Dashboard) |

---

### 二、核心架构

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                      TUN Device Layer                            │
│               (内核级流量拦截，TCP/UDP 数据包捕获)               │
└────────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────────────┘
                             │
            ┌────────────────┼────────────────┐
            ▼                ▼                ▼
      ┌──────────┐    ┌──────────┐    ┌──────────┐
      │ TLS/443  │    │ HTTP/80  │    │  其他    │
      │SNI 提取  │    │Host 解析 │    │ 直接转发 │
      └────┬─────┘    └────┬─────┘    └────┬─────┘
           │               │               │
           └───────────────┼───────────────┘
                           ▼
           ┌───────────────────────────────┐
           │    Routing Decision Engine    │
           │   Bypass→Cache→Nacos→GeoIP    │
           └───────────────┬───────────────┘
                           │
         ┌─────────────────┼─────────────────┐
         ▼                 ▼                 ▼
   ┌───────────┐    ┌───────────┐    ┌───────────┐
   │ Nonelane  │    │    Door   │    │  Direct   │
   │ (MITM)    │    │(VLESS/SS) │    │  直连     │
   └───────────┘    └───────────┘    └───────────┘
```

---

### 三、目录结构分析

| 目录/包 | 职责描述 |
|---------|---------|
| **`cmd/`** | CLI 入口 (基于 Cobra) |
| ├─ `nursor/main.go` | 程序主入口 |
| └─ `root.go, start.go` | 子命令定义 |
| **`inbound/`** | 入站流量捕获层 |
| ├─ `tun/` | TUN 设备、协议栈、隧道处理 (100+ 文件) |
| └─ `http/` | HTTP CONNECT 代理入口 |
| **`outbound/`** | 出站代理协议实现 |
| ├─ `proxy/vless/` | VLESS 协议 (支持 Vision/Reality) |
| ├─ `proxy/shadowsocks/` | Shadowsocks 协议 |
| ├─ `proxy/shadowtls/` | ShadowTLS 协议 (伪装 TLS) |
| ├─ `proxy/nonelane/` | 内置 MITM 代理 |
| └─ `registry.go` | 代理注册中心 (单例模式) |
| **`processor/`** | 核心业务处理层 |
| ├─ `rules/engine.go` | 路由决策引擎 |
| ├─ `cache/ipdomain.go` | DNS 双向缓存 |
| ├─ `geoip/` | IP 地理位置 routing |
| ├─ `nacos/` | Nacos 服务发现集成 |
| └─ `stats/` | 实时流量统计 |
| **`app/`** | Web 应用层 |
| ├─ `http/handlers/` | REST API 端点 |
| └─ `website/` | Web Dashboard (嵌入式前端) |
| **`common/`** | 公共基础设施 |
| ├─ `logger/` | 结构化日志 (支持 Sentry) |
| ├─ `config/` | Nacos 配置中心集成 |
| └─ `model/` | 数据模型定义 |
| **`export.go`** | **CGO FFI 导出接口** (被注释/归档) |

---

### 四、核心技术亮点

#### 1. DNS 缓存系统 (最新完成 Phase 4)

```go
type DNSInfo struct {
    BindingSource BindingSource  // SNI, HTTP, CONNECT, DNS
    BindingTime   time.Time
    CacheTTL      time.Duration
    ShouldCache   bool
    Route         RouteDecision   // 记录路由决策
}
```

**解决问题**：TUN 设备只能捕获 TCP/UDP 层流量，无法获取应用层 DNS 查询上下文。

**方案**：
- SNI 提取 (TLS ClientHello)
- HTTP Host Header 解析
- CONNECT 请求解析
- 自动缓存 IP↔Domain 双向映射

#### 2. 路由决策优先级

```
Priority 1: Bypass (用户定义的直连规则)
Priority 2: Cache (已评估的路由缓存)
Priority 3: Nacos (Cursor MITM/加速域名)
Priority 4: GeoIP (基于地理位置)
Priority 5: Direct (默认直连)
```

#### 3. 代理注册中心

```go
type Registry struct {
    mu        sync.RWMutex
    proxies   map[string]proxy.Proxy  // 代理实例映射
    doorGroup *DoorProxyGroup         // 门代理组 (多节点选择)
}
```

**支持代理类型**：
- `direct` - 直连
- `nonelane` - 内置 MITM 代理
- `vless` - VLESS (支持 Vision/Reality)
- `shadowsocks` - SS 协议
- `shadowtls` - TLS 伪装
- `door:XXX` - 门代理成员 (按延迟自动选择)

---

### 五、关键依赖库

| 依赖 | 用途 |
|------|------|
| `github.com/sagernet/gvisor` | 用户态网络协议栈 |
| `github.com/sagernet/sing-box` | 代理协议实现 |
| `github.com/xjasonlyu/tun2socks/v2` | TUN 设备集成 |
| `github.com/nacos-group/nacos-sdk-go` | 服务发现/配置中心 |
| `github.com/oschwald/geoip2-golang` | IP 地理位置 |
| `github.com/miekg/dns` | DNS 协议支持 |
| `github.com/spf13/cobra` | CLI 框架 |
| `gorm.io/gorm` | MySQL ORM (持久化) |

---

### 六、设计模式

| 模式 | 应用场景 |
|------|---------|
| **单例模式** | `GetRegistry()`, `GetEngine()` |
| **工厂模式** | `createVLESSProxy()`, `createShadowsocksProxy()` |
| **策略模式** | `Proxy` 接口统一抽象多种协议 |
| **注册表模式** | 代理名称→实例映射 |
| **依赖注入** | RuleEngine 注入 GeoIP/Cache 服务 |

---

### 七、代码质量观察

#### ✅ 优点

1. **清晰的分层架构** - inbound/processor/outbound 职责分明
2. **完善的文档** - README 详细记录开发历程
3. **规范的模式** - 接口抽象、单例、工厂模式
4. **活跃开发** - Phase 4 最近完成 (2024.12)

#### ⚠️ 注意点

1. **`export.go` 已归档** - 732 行 CGO FFI 代码被注释，表明正在从 FFI 迁移
2. **重构进行中** - `docs/REFACTORING_*.md` 显示目录结构正在调整
3. **TODO 存在** - `engine.go` 中有 `TODO(US2)` 标记待完成

---

### 八、运行与构建

```bash
# 构建
go build -o nursorgate ./cmd/nursor

# 运行 (需要 root 权限创建 TUN 设备)
sudo ./nursorgate --config config.json

# 访问 Dashboard
open http://localhost:56431
```

---

### 九、总结

**Nursorgate** 是一个设计精良的透明代理系统，核心价值在于：

1. **透明性** - TUN 层拦截无需应用配置
2. **智能化** - 多维度路由决策
3. **可观测性** - 实时 DNS 缓存、流量统计
4. **扩展性** - 模块化代理注册机制

项目处于活跃开发状态，最近完成了完整的 DNS 缓存系统，代码质量较高，适合继续迭代开发。

---

<answer>
High-level architectural overview of the codebase

1) Main entry points and startup flow
- CLI entry and orchestration
  - /Users/mac/MyProgram/GoProgram/AnyDoor/anydoor-core-from-nursor/cmd/root.go
    - Defines the root Cobra command “nonelane” and global flags (config path, token).
    - RunE on the root delegates to runStart, which centralizes startup orchestration.
  - /Users/mac/MyProgram/GoProgram/AnyDoor/anydoor-core-from-nursor/cmd/start.go
    - Implements the start subcommand; this is the primary path used to bootstrap the server with either a config file or embedded defaults.
    - Calls into the runtime initialization, loads or applies configuration, initializes Nacos, GeoIP, DNS caches, and starts the HTTP server.

- Runtime entry (fixpoint for server processes)
  - The codebase wires HTTP server startup and the TUN-based proxy startup together; http server is launched as a goroutine in the startup path, while the TUN engine is initialized via inbound/tun/engine/engine.go.

2) Core packages/modules and their responsibilities
- CLI and startup orchestration
  - cmd/ root.go, cmd/start.go
- TUN device and runtime
  - inbound/tun/engine/engine.go
  - inbound/tun/engine/parse.go (referenced by engine)
  - inbound/tun/engine/engine.go contains Start/Stop logic for the default tunneling engine and wiring with the default proxy and stack.
- Proxy execution and registry
  - outbound/proxy (direct, vless, shadowsocks)
  - outbound/registry and outbound/proxyserver for proxy registration and discovery
- HTTP API surface, handlers, and DI
  - app/http/routes/routes.go defines routes and a DI-friendly NewHandlers() that wires services and repositories
  - app/http/handlers/* (various handlers for logs, proxy, DNS cache, cert, auth, startup, etc.)
  - app/http/services/* and app/http/repositories/* implement business logic and data access layers for HTTP endpoints
- Configuration and global state
  - processor/config/engine.go defines the engine-specific config (EngineConf)
  - processor/config/global.go provides a global singleton for application config and related update utilities
  - processor/config/types.go contains the domain models used for configuration (routing rules, door proxies, DNS pre-resolution, etc.)
  - common/config/nacos.go provides a Nacos client wrapper used by HTTP config endpoints
- Routing and policy evaluation
  - common/model/routing_config.go defines routing domain models (RuleType, RoutingRule, RoutingRuleSet, RoutingRulesConfig)
  - processor/routing/decision_engine.go implements the routing decision strategy (priorities: none_lane -> to_door -> geoip -> direct) and rule evaluation helpers
  - processor/dns and processor/rules (as seen in imports) suggest DNS caching and rule evaluation integration with routing
- DNS caching and DNS binding persistence
  - common/cache/cachedir.go provides DNS/Nacos cache directory management
  - processor/dns (and related code) handles DNS binding, caching, and binding store logic (as described in README)
- DNS pre-resolution and Nacos integration
  - common/config/nacos.go wraps a Nacos client with cache/log path awareness
  - processor/config/types.go and processor/config/global.go tie config loading and persistence
- Authentication and user activation
  - processor/auth/token_activate.go handles activating a user via token, saving user info locally, and setting up token refresh
  - processor/auth/user_info.go and token_refresh.go (referenced by the startup logic) manage user session metadata
- Logging and observability
  - common/logger/logger.go is the central logging facility, with error dedup, multi-writer outputs (stdout and optional file), and Sentry integration
  - app/http/services/logger.go and related logger handlers expose log controls over HTTP
- Global startup state and lifecycle
  - processor/runtime/startup_state.go defines a global StartupState singleton with status and fetch results; used to gate HTTP routes and startup transitions
- Misc / dev notes
  - README.md and export.go provide architectural context and historical notes (export.go contains CGo interop scaffolding or legacy references)

3) Key abstractions and design patterns
- Global singletons and controlled initialization
  - Global config (processor/config/global.go) and StartupState (processor/runtime/startup_state.go) use sync.Once / RWMutex to provide safe, global state.
- Dependency Injection
  - NewHandlers in app/http/routes/routes.go constructs handlers with explicit dependencies (services, repositories, etc.), enabling modular testing and swap-out of components.
- Registry pattern and pluggable proxies
  - Registry access via outbound.GetRegistry() and related proxy creation (direct.NewDirect()) indicate a registry-based plugin/adapter pattern for proxies that can be discovered and swapped.
- Strategy / Rule-based routing
  - routing/decision_engine.go implements a prioritized strategy for routing decisions, driven by a RoutingRulesConfig with multiple rule sets (ToDoor, BlackList, NoneLane) and a combination of RuleTypes (Domain, IP, GeoIP).
- Data models with validation
  - common/model/routing_config.go and processor/config/types.go encode domain-level models with explicit validation routines, enabling consistent config shape and runtime checks.
- TUN-based data path and separation of concerns
  - inbound/tun/* packages handle the kernel-level interception and tun/disk integration, while outbound handles proxying and registry; the engine ties these together, illustrating a clean separation between interception, routing decisions, and data relay.
- Config-driven runtime composition
  - Global config and EngineConf drive the setup for the native TUN stack, the routing engine, and the DNS caching layer; the HTTP config API layer interacts with Nacos config for live config changes.

4) General data flow (high level)
- Startup phase
  - Start.go loads configuration (from file or embedded default), initializes global rule engine, and may initialize Nacos if configured.
  - The HTTP server starts (and is protected by startup status middleware).
  - The TUN engine is started, wiring with the default proxy and DNS resolver.
- Configuration and routing
  - Routing rules are represented by RoutingRulesConfig (ToDoor, BlackList, NoneLane) with a nested set of RoutingRule items and Settings.
  - The routing decision engine (DecideRoute) evaluates the context (domain, IP, other metadata) against routing configs to decide between RouteToNoneLane, RouteToDoor, or RouteDirect.
- Traffic handling
  - TUN intercepts traffic; TLS SNI, HTTP Host/header, and CONNECT metadata extraction populate DNS binding records (DNSInfo) stored in the DNS cache.
  - The DNS cache layer combines domain → IP and IP → domain mappings with hit/miss stats; a StoreBinding path persists new bindings.
  - Routing decisions trigger RouteExecution: RouteToCursor (MITM-like path) or RouteToDoor (forward to a door proxy such as VLESS or Shadowsocks), or RouteDirect for direct connection.
  - Data relay occurs via the chosen path, with stats updated by the traffic stats subsystem.
- Observability and control
  - HTTP endpoints expose runtime status, DNS cache status, router engine status, and configuration toggles; a startup status API gate (StartupStatus) prevents premature routing until the system is ready.

5) Configuration handling and middleware/plugin patterns
- Configuration
  - Core config types live in processor/config/types.go; EngineConf and the global Config object feed the runtime (TUN engine, DNS, NAT rules, etc.).
  - Global config management via processor/config/global.go provides a single source of truth for in-memory config and a method to persist changes to a file (SaveConfigToFile).
  - Nacos integration (common/config/nacos.go and processor/config/global.go) enables live configuration retrieval in the HTTP API routes, with a cache/log directory setup to support config caching.
- Middleware / endpoints
  - The HTTP API layer (app/http/routes/routes.go) wires various endpoints and qualifies HTTP handlers with dependencies injected through NewHandlers().
  - Startup gating via processor/runtime startup state ensures HTTP endpoints reflect readiness (e.g., certain routes may be guarded until READY).
  - The codebase includes HTTP middleware-style constructs (StartupStatus middleware in app/http/middleware/startup_status.go) to gate functionality during startup.

6) Notable patterns and potential improvements (observations)
- Strengths
  - Clear separation of concerns: TUN layer vs. proxy execution vs. DNS/cache vs. HTTP API.
  - Strong usage of configuration-driven design with global singletons and an extensible routing rule model.
  - Dependency injection for HTTP handlers facilitates testing and modularity.
  - Registry-based proxy management enables plugging new proxies or swapping implementations.
- Potential areas to consider for improvement
  - Entry point clarity: The actual main.go-like entry is not obvious in the repository (export.go has package main but appears to be a CGo stub). Ensure there is a single, well-documented binary entry (e.g., cmd/nursor/main.go) and align the naming in code and README to avoid confusion.
  - Tests and coverage around the routing engine (decision_engine.go) and DNS binding store logic would help ensure correctness for complex rule combinations.
  - Investigate decoupling of the HTTP config endpoints from the Nacos client if live-config changes are heavy or risk destabilizing the runtime; consider a more explicit config reload strategy with versioning.
  - Documentation alignment: the README describes a multi-phase feature set; ensure the codebase’s package layout and module names reflect the documented architecture to minimize mismatches for new contributors.

7) Concrete takeaways for deeper exploration
- Entry points
  - Inspect the actual binary main file or the script that invokes cmd/root.go.Execute() to confirm the runtime bootstrap path and any platform-specific behavior (macOS/Linux differences).
- Core domain types and config
  - Dive into processor/config/types.go to understand all routing rule primitives and how they map to the decision engine.
  - Review common/model/routing_config.go for detailed data structures used in routing decisions.
- Routing and DNS mechanisms
  - Read processor/routing/decision_engine.go to confirm the priority order and how wildcard/domain matching is performed.
  - Review DNS binding persistence in processor/dns (not fully opened here) to understand how DNS bindings are collected, cached, and used to optimize routing.
- TUN engine and data path
  - Explore inbound/tun/engine/engine.go to understand how the TUN device, default proxy, and transport layer are wired and how errors propagate to startup/shutdown.
- Observability
  - Examine common/logger/logger.go to understand the deduplication logic and integration with Sentry for error reporting.

If you’d like, I can:
- Produce a detailed, diagram-style map of components and their interactions.
- Extract a concise list of all absolute paths to key domain types and their responsibilities.
- Propose a focused review plan with concrete questions for each major module (routing, DNS cache, Nacos config, TUN engine, HTTP API).
</answer>

<next_steps>
- Use this architectural map to prepare a presentation or a design review for stakeholders.
- If you want, I can turn this into a visual architecture diagram (components, data flow, and module boundaries) and extend it with sequence diagrams for startup and a typical traffic path.
- Optionally, I can draft a targeted code-reading plan focusing on the most impactful subsystems (routing engine, DNS cache, TUN engine) and provide a checklist for improvements.
</next_steps>
```

### **MANDATORY CERTAINTY PROTOCOL**

**IF YOU ARE NOT 100% CERTAIN:**

1. **THINK DEEPLY** - What is the user's TRUE intent? What problem are they REALLY trying to solve?
2. **EXPLORE THOROUGHLY** - Fire explore/librarian agents to gather ALL relevant context
3. **CONSULT SPECIALISTS** - For hard/complex tasks, DO NOT struggle alone. Delegate:
   - **Oracle**: Conventional problems - architecture, debugging, complex logic
   - **Artistry**: Non-conventional problems - different approach needed, unusual constraints
4. **ASK THE USER** - If ambiguity remains after exploration, ASK. Don't guess.

**SIGNS YOU ARE NOT READY TO IMPLEMENT:**
- You're making assumptions about requirements
- You're unsure which files to modify
- You don't understand how existing code works
- Your plan has "probably" or "maybe" in it
- You can't explain the exact steps you'll take

```

## MANDATORY: PLAN AGENT INVOCATION (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

**YOU MUST ALWAYS INVOKE THE PLAN AGENT FOR ANY NON-TRIVIAL TASK.**

| Condition | Action |
|-----------|--------|
| Task has 2+ steps | MUST call plan agent |
| Task scope unclear | MUST call plan agent |
| Implementation required | MUST call plan agent |
| Architecture decision needed | MUST call plan agent |

```
task(subagent_type="plan", load_skills=[], prompt="<gathered context + user request>")
```

**WHY PLAN AGENT IS MANDATORY:**
- Plan agent analyzes dependencies and parallel execution opportunities
- Plan agent outputs a **parallel task graph** with waves and dependencies
- Plan agent provides structured TODO list with category + skills per task
- YOU are an orchestrator, NOT an implementer

### SESSION CONTINUITY WITH PLAN AGENT (CRITICAL)

**Plan agent returns a session_id. USE IT for follow-up interactions.**

| Scenario | Action |
|----------|--------|
| Plan agent asks clarifying questions | `task(session_id="{returned_session_id}", load_skills=[], prompt="<your answer>")` |
| Need to refine the plan | `task(session_id="{returned_session_id}", load_skills=[], prompt="Please adjust: <feedback>")` |
| Plan needs more detail | `task(session_id="{returned_session_id}", load_skills=[], prompt="Add more detail to Task N")` |

**WHY SESSION_ID IS CRITICAL:**
- Plan agent retains FULL conversation context
- No repeated exploration or context gathering
- Saves 70%+ tokens on follow-ups
- Maintains interview continuity until plan is finalized

```
// WRONG: Starting fresh loses all context
task(subagent_type="plan", load_skills=[], prompt="Here's more info...")

// CORRECT: Resume preserves everything
task(session_id="ses_abc123", load_skills=[], prompt="Here's my answer to your question: ...")
```

**FAILURE TO CALL PLAN AGENT = INCOMPLETE WORK.**

---

## AGENTS / **CATEGORY + SKILLS** UTILIZATION PRINCIPLES

**DEFAULT BEHAVIOR: DELEGATE. DO NOT WORK YOURSELF.**

| Task Type | Action | Why |
|-----------|--------|-----|
| Codebase exploration | task(subagent_type="explore", load_skills=[], run_in_background=true) | Parallel, context-efficient |
| Documentation lookup | task(subagent_type="librarian", load_skills=[], run_in_background=true) | Specialized knowledge |
| Planning | task(subagent_type="plan", load_skills=[]) | Parallel task graph + structured TODO list |
| Hard problem (conventional) | task(subagent_type="oracle", load_skills=[]) | Architecture, debugging, complex logic |
| Hard problem (non-conventional) | task(category="artistry", load_skills=[...]) | Different approach needed |
| Implementation | task(category="...", load_skills=[...]) | Domain-optimized models |

**CATEGORY + SKILL DELEGATION:**
```
// Frontend work
task(category="visual-engineering", load_skills=["frontend-ui-ux"])

// Complex logic
task(category="ultrabrain", load_skills=["typescript-programmer"])

// Quick fixes
task(category="quick", load_skills=["git-master"])
```

**YOU SHOULD ONLY DO IT YOURSELF WHEN:**
- Task is trivially simple (1-2 lines, obvious change)
- You have ALL context already loaded
- Delegation overhead exceeds task complexity

**OTHERWISE: DELEGATE. ALWAYS.**

---

## EXECUTION RULES
- **TODO**: Track EVERY step. Mark complete IMMEDIATELY after each.
- **PARALLEL**: Fire independent agent calls simultaneously via task(run_in_background=true) - NEVER wait sequentially.
- **BACKGROUND FIRST**: Use task for exploration/research agents (10+ concurrent if needed).
- **VERIFY**: Re-read request after completion. Check ALL requirements met before reporting done.
- **DELEGATE**: Don't do everything yourself - orchestrate specialized agents for their strengths.

## WORKFLOW
1. Analyze the request and identify required capabilities
2. Spawn exploration/librarian agents via task(run_in_background=true) in PARALLEL (10+ if needed)
3. Use Plan agent with gathered context to create detailed work breakdown
4. Execute with continuous verification against original requirements

## VERIFICATION GUARANTEE (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

**NOTHING is "done" without PROOF it works.**

### Pre-Implementation: Define Success Criteria

BEFORE writing ANY code, you MUST define:

| Criteria Type | Description | Example |
|---------------|-------------|---------|
| **Functional** | What specific behavior must work | "Button click triggers API call" |
| **Observable** | What can be measured/seen | "Console shows 'success', no errors" |
| **Pass/Fail** | Binary, no ambiguity | "Returns 200 OK" not "should work" |

Write these criteria explicitly. **Record them in your TODO/Task items.** Each task MUST include a "QA: [how to verify]" field. These criteria are your CONTRACT — work toward them, verify against them.

### Test Plan Template (MANDATORY for non-trivial tasks)

```
## Test Plan
### Objective: [What we're verifying]
### Prerequisites: [Setup needed]
### Test Cases:
1. [Test Name]: [Input] → [Expected Output] → [How to verify]
2. ...
### Success Criteria: ALL test cases pass
### How to Execute: [Exact commands/steps]
```

### Execution & Evidence Requirements

| Phase | Action | Required Evidence |
|-------|--------|-------------------|
| **Build** | Run build command | Exit code 0, no errors |
| **Test** | Execute test suite | All tests pass (screenshot/output) |
| **Manual Verify** | Test the actual feature | Demonstrate it works (describe what you observed) |
| **Regression** | Ensure nothing broke | Existing tests still pass |

**WITHOUT evidence = NOT verified = NOT done.**

**YOUR FAILURE MODE**: You finish coding, run lsp_diagnostics, and declare "done" without actually TESTING the feature. lsp_diagnostics catches type errors, NOT functional bugs. Your work is NOT verified until you MANUALLY test it.

**WHAT MANUAL QA MEANS — execute ALL that apply:**

| If your change... | YOU MUST... |

### TDD Workflow (when test infrastructure exists)

1. **SPEC**: Define what "working" means (success criteria above)
2. **RED**: Write failing test → Run it → Confirm it FAILS
3. **GREEN**: Write minimal code → Run test → Confirm it PASSES
4. **REFACTOR**: Clean up → Tests MUST stay green
5. **VERIFY**: Run full test suite, confirm no regressions
6. **EVIDENCE**: Report what you ran and what output you saw
